scenario_summary: 2010 DFRWS Nitroba wardrive challenge pcap. A campus network packet capture traces harassing email activity from a dorm resident to a faculty member. The forensic pivot chain moves from DHCP lease windows through SMTP/HTTP flows to a one-shot URL and finally to a roster-matched dorm room and MAC address.
expected_investigation_path: pivot to roster + MAC + dorm room
memorization_risk_note: The Nitroba challenge is a 2010 competition dataset with published community writeups. Memorization risk is medium — the wardrive scenario is widely discussed but per-packet evidence paths require genuine forensic reasoning against the mounted pcap.
notes: MD5 legacy: 9981827f11968773ff815e39f5458ec8. Full binary is gitignored; fetch from the DFRWS 2010 challenge archive. Stub for CI hash-verify is at stubs/nitroba-stub.pcap (nitroba-stub.manifest.json).
